description: Azure ComputeCluster ImportData — AKS node pool identity / network.

clusterId.description: Cluster identifier used by the controller.

clusterIdentityPrincipalId.description: AKS cluster identity principal id (system-assigned identity).

identityId.description: Resource ID of the user-assigned identity attached to cluster VMs.

kubeletIdentityClientId.description: kubelet UAMI client id used by node pools.
